JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-23-2019 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JUN-19-2019 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SF IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY MARLA GREEN. DEFENDANT WAI MAN LEE IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY NON-CERTIFIED CANTONESE INTERPRETER JENNY WONG. MS. WONG WAS GIVEN THE INTERPRETERS OATH BY COURT CLERK: R. SAHATJAIN. PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IN COURT. DEFENDANT SHALL PAY $250 EVERY MONTH FOR 20 MONTHS. PROGRESS REPORTS WILL OCCUR EVERY SIX MONTHS. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED IF NO PAYMENTS ARE MADE. FINAL PROGRESS REPORT WILL BE IN OCT-2020, IF NO APPEARANCE AT THE OCT HEARING THE MATTER WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
